---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Load the extension: `pi -e ./src/index.ts`
2. Run this command: `/goal <objective>`
3. Do this: ...
4. See error: ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- Pi version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Telos version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- OS: [e.g., macOS, Linux, WSL]
- Node.js version: [run `node --version`]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Console Output
If there are error messages, please paste them here:

```
Paste console output here
```

## Goal State (if applicable)
If the bug is related to goal management, please provide:
- Current goal status: [active/paused/blocked/complete/budget_limited]
- Goal objective: [paste objective]
- Token budget (if set): [number]
- Tokens used: [number]
